## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install construction_cost_risk_analysis in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure construction_cost_risk_analysis package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to construction_cost_risk_analysis
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/construction_cost_risk_analysis):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/construction_cost_risk_analysis.git
```

or from
[conda](https://anaconda.org/justforprogramming07-code/construction_cost_risk_analysis)

``` sh
$ conda install -c justforprogramming07-code construction_cost_risk_analysis
```

or from
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/construction_cost_risk_analysis/)

``` sh
$ pip install construction_cost_risk_analysis
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/construction_cost_risk_analysis)’s
[pages](https://justforprogramming07-code.github.io/construction_cost_risk_analysis/).
Additionally you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/justforprogramming07-code/construction_cost_risk_analysis)
and [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/construction_cost_risk_analysis/)
respectively.
